hooks.text: Stop using slow bank wires to pay your China supplier. There are three roads.

hooks.template: Everyone tells you to (insert action) but nobody actually tells you how to do it. Here is a #-second step-by-step tutorial that you can save.
hooks.text: Everyone tells business owners to wire China fast. Nobody shows the three roads. Save this.

hooks.template: Yesterday I was at (insert location) when I noticed something (insert adjective).
hooks.text: Two business owners paid the same factory same day. One waited five days. One didn't.

hooks.template: My customer/client got (insert dream result) without (insert pain point).
hooks.text: This business owner got same-day China payment without the five-day bank wait.

hooks.template: What (insert title) says vs what they mean.
hooks.text: What your bank says: payment sent. What it means: stuck in three middle banks.
